# Smart Search 0.3.0

Smart Search 0.3.0 is the first stable release of the deterministic Agent-facing CLI contract.

## Highlights

- Provides a compact capability tree for web answers, source discovery, documentation and repository reading, known-URL extraction, and site mapping.
- Assigns one responsible provider to every operation: Grok, Exa, Context7, Zhipu MCP ZRead, or Firecrawl.
- Removes cross-provider fallback, provider selection flags, deprecated Exa Similar, AnySearch, and Deep Research commands from the Agent contract.
- Adds complete skill lifecycle management through `smart-search setup` and `smart-search skills install|uninstall|status|update`.
- Uses one canonical skill copy per Project or Global scope, with POSIX symlinks, Windows junctions, and automatic copy fallback.
- Ships a single bundled `smart-search-cli` skill source in both the Python wheel and npm package.
- Expands diagnostics, configuration validation, mock smoke tests, and Linux/macOS/Windows skill-install CI coverage.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @shirlytaylor73/smart-search@latest
smart-search setup
```

Install the Agent skill without a prior global CLI installation:

```bash
npx --yes --package=@shirlytaylor73/smart-search@latest \
  smart-search skills install --project --agent codex --yes
```

See `README.md` or `README.zh-CN.md` for the full command and migration reference.
